# StreamableHttpServerOptions.SupportsPreHeaderClients property

When `true`, a POST that omits the `MCP-Protocol-Version` header is treated as [`EarliestRevision`](./EarliestRevision.md) rather than rejected, supporting clients that predate the header (R-9.3.3-c). Defaults to `false` (an absent header is a `-32001` mismatch).

```csharp
public bool SupportsPreHeaderClients { get; set; }
```
